title: quantile() and median() commands crash when used 2x on the same variable on a null table
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value REAL, description TEXT );
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (1, NULL, 'first'), (2, NULL, 'second'), (3, 1.5, 'third');
CREATE TABLE another_table ( ref_id INTEGER, score REAL, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES test_table(id) );
INSERT INTO another_table (ref_id, score) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 2.5), (3, NULL);
SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table WHERE id <= 3;
key_bug_features: quantile() and median() on null table
